description: This file defines a React component called DashboardShell, which is part of the frontend UI for the student dashboard in the EduConnect platform. It includes a sidebar navigation, top header, and main content area, with support for mobile and desktop views.

methods.name: SidebarNav
methods.description: Component rendering a list of navigation items with icons.

methods.name: DashboardShell
methods.description: Main exported component providing the dashboard layout with navigation, header, and content.
